# Fast Piggie — Auto-Advance Rounds

**Goal:**
Remove the requirement to click the continue button between rounds. After a round ends, the next round should start automatically after a 1-second delay.

**Instructions:**

- Update the round flow logic in app/games/fast-piggie/game.js and app/games/fast-piggie/index.js.
- Remove or disable the continue button.
- Ensure the next round starts automatically after a 1-second delay.
- Update or add tests in app/games/fast-piggie/tests/ to verify auto-advance behavior.

**Verification:**

- Play Fast Piggie: Confirm rounds auto-advance after 1 second without clicking.
- All tests pass with 100% function coverage.
